title: Totems of Resurrection
description: Revive your friends in a fair way! (meant for hardcore)
body:
Ever needed to revive your friends in a shared hardcore world? Now you can! I made this mod so people can have a fair way to craft something that revives your friends. IT IS EXPENSIVE, but it is worth it. You can revive multiple people at the same time with this mod!

Sadly because of update reasons, this mod is only for Forge. Fabric coming soon hopefully though!

This mod includes:
Crafting Recipe For Totem Of Reviving
Crafting Recipe For Heart
Crafting Recipe For Totem Of Conjuring
3 Advancements!
